name: Twenty One Capital, Inc.
business: Twenty One Capital is a newly formed operating company focused exclusively on Bitcoin-related business lines, offering shareholders a differentiated opportunity to gain exposure to Bitcoin through the capital markets. It engages in actively accumulating and managing Bitcoin holdings and developing educational materials and branded content to drive institutional and retail investor Bitcoin literacy.

exposures.sentence: Twenty One Capital is a newly formed operating company focused exclusively on Bitcoin-related business lines that among other things, offer shareholders a differentiated opportunity to gain exposure to Bitcoin through the capital markets.

catalysts.sentence: The Closing date of the Business Combination was December 8, 2025.
